summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification for 10 listed pull requests using the supplied cluster preflight artifact as live state. No GitHub mutations are planned beyond non-mutating classifications because this shard is not a dedupe cluster and merge/fix actions are blocked by job frontmatter.

actions.reason: Useful open candidate with a unique QQBot availability/message-delivery scope, but proof is failing and no canonical duplicate or replacement is established.
Distinct open LM Studio feature candidate with supplied proof, not a duplicate or closure target in this shard.
Small open docs PR with a clear source issue and passing proof, but merge is blocked by job frontmatter and maintainer-review posture.
Open security-boundary/trust-sensitive PR must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling, not backlog cleanup.
Open workflow/automation PR touches security-boundary surfaces and is explicitly security-sensitive in preflight.
Already closed refs must not receive closure actions; record only the skipped closed-state classification.
Already closed because the fix is implemented on main; no further closure action is valid.
Security-sensitive voice-call/privacy-context item should remain quarantined even though no close action is valid for the already closed PR.
Useful follow-up PR related to a landed fix, not a duplicate closeout target in this inventory shard.
Distinct provider feature candidate with failing proof/checks; keep classified as related/open rather than closing or merging.
